summary: Ambiguous naming hides domain intent and increases misuse risk.

findings.evidence: process(d, f, t) and class name BizService hide business meaning; names do not express domain intent.
findings.minimal_fix: Rename service/method/parameters to domain terms (e.g., OrderStatusService.resolveStatus(order, isApproved, channel)).
findings.verification: Run existing tests and add one naming-focused review checklist to confirm method names describe behavior.

findings.evidence: Boolean flag f switches divergent formatting policies in one method, combining two reasons to change.
findings.minimal_fix: Split into two explicit methods for approved/rejected flows or introduce a small strategy object.
findings.verification: Add separate tests for each explicit path and verify no flag-based branching remains.
